<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Check type ID

`kind: markdown_writing_tells`

**Severity:** warning, reported for review; never fails a run.

## Purpose

Warn on likely AI-writing tells (em dashes, decorative emoji, overused words, stock phrases) for human review.

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: markdown_writing_tells
```
